text: Board rejects EQT's improved proposal of £54, which "fundamentally undervalues" company.
Deletion: Atlas confirms that it does not intend to make a firm offer for BRCK
Shareholders approve scheme, with over 99.9% of votes.
New addition: discussions with 3 companies, no price.
Deletion: formal sales process terminated, administrators appointed, no returns for shareholders expected.
Q1 trading update: 2026 performance anticipated to be above the Board's previous expectations.
